category_sources: source_facts.description: CLI for working with C2PA manifests and media assets; official c2pa-rs README describes the C2PA Rust library as part of the Content Authenticity Initiative open-source SDK.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is c2patool; official c2pa-rs cli README names the tool c2patool.
docs_sources: Official c2pa-rs README points to the CAI Open Source SDK documentation website and includes c2patool documentation links; GitHub cli README and usage.md are official repository docs.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description mentions C2PA manifests and media assets; official c2pa-rs README ties the project to the Content Authenticity Initiative SDK.
